Localization.Description: Attempt to start or stop a virtual machine group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is stopping virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} stopped virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is starting virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} started virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
